event: Tatars crossed the frozen river in Hexi to invade Shanxi; millions of soldiers and civilians in Shuntian Prefecture lacked grain.
Internal chaos among chieftains in Dongchuan.
Refugee rebellion in Jiangxi attacked Taihe; Miao people rebellion in Sichuan invaded Huguang border.
Earthquakes in Shanxi, Shaanxi, and Ningxia with countless military and civilian casualties.
